description_long: This bungalow features a low-pitched, multi-faceted hip roof with brown shingles and a wide overhang, providing ample shade to the structure. The exterior walls are finished in a light gray color, complemented by wooden trim around the windows and base. A small, covered front porch with white railings and wooden steps leads to the main entrance, adding a welcoming touch. The windows are rectangular and symmetrically placed on the visible facades, with some grouped together for balanced natural lighting. The building sits on a patterned base that mimics a landscaped yard, bordered by a simple fence on two sides. The overall design is compact and single-storied, typical of suburban residential neighborhoods.
description: A single-story bungalow with a hip roof, light gray walls, wooden trim, and a small covered front porch with white railings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, covered porch with white railings, and wooden steps.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting two large rectangular windows and the extended hip roof, with a fence visible on the right.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a single window and the continuation of the hip roof, with a fence and some decorative panels on the left.
description_view_3: Opposite front view showing the porch from a different angle, with the main door and a side window visible.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical front-facing windows with grouped side windows
